subscriber.tour.step1.body: Every week, your washerwoman comes on the agreed day. You'll know when she's coming — by SMS and in the app.
subscriber.tour.step1.title: Your next visit is here.
subscriber.tour.step2.body: Akouvi is the one who comes to your home. Over the weeks, you get to know each other — no surprise rotations.
subscriber.tour.step2.title: Your washerwoman, always the same.
subscriber.tour.step3.body: Every successful visit counts. The longer you stay, the more trust grows — and quality with it.
subscriber.tour.step3.title: A relationship that lasts.
subscriber.visit.detail.brings.body: Nothing — you provide the water, soap, and basin, as usual.
